name: Rum Bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add the banana halves to the pan and sprinkle with half of the brown sugar and a few dashes of cinnamon.
3. Cook until the bananas are lightly browned on one side.
4. Use a spatula to turn the bananas, then sprinkle them with the remaining brown sugar and additional cinnamon.
5. When the bananas are browned on the other side, add the rum and gently ignite it (if desired).
6. Serve the bananas warm with any remaining liquid from the pan.
